title: BewitchmentJEI
description: An addon to Bewitchment that adds JEI support.
body:
BewitchmentJEI is an addon to Bewitchment that adds support for viewing recipes in Just Enough Items.

For Ritual, Curse, and Incense recipes, this mod uses a layout that is different to the one provided in the base mod, and is closer to the 1.12.2 version.

For EMI support on 1.20.1, please directly use the base mod.

This mod supports being loaded with Sinytra Connector, requiring Connector Extras (and Forge 47.1.3).
